auth_check_email_reset: Ijukakinit sio yes arucokinet naka aitemokin akirot naka aisibwoun. Kelipit koanyanaar asaduku kon naka e-mail.
auth_check_email_signup: Ijukakinit sio yes arucokina naka aitogogongio. Kelipit itogogong e-mail kon kanu ainyikokin.
auth_forgot_subtitle: Kodum elago loerucokitai keda akaunt kon ido ijukakini sio jo arucokinet naepedoria jo aitemokin akirot kon naka aiyeyea.
auth_google_failed: Abu aipikakin akan mama ejai Google ipiko.
auth_missing_fields_msg: Kilipit ibwaik elago kon ka akirot naka aiyeyea.
auth_weak_password_msg: Ibusakinit akirot naka aisibwoun araun naedolete iponesio ikanyape.
decision_approved_msg: Isiyalamikitai! Acamakinio ilonikon kosodete ailem ikapun kon mama ejai esimu kon.
decision_approved_next: Aponi ijukarai ikapun kon toma enaaba loka ikapun kon kosimu. Koany esimu kon kanu aitigogongio naka agwelanar.
decision_declined_msg: Nukaiturur, mam aponi kocamakinai ailipikon kotoma apak kana.
decision_declined_next: Ipedori ijo aitojokar epurofailikon kosodi aitam bobo ekaulo, arai bo aingic ijanakinak ice.
decision_review_msg: Ipuda ailipakon airereonor bobo. Ilimokinenei sio jo kotoma osawan 24.
decision_review_next: Kiboikin ejok — ijukakini sio jo aijen atipet akaulo na angetakin airereonor akiro.
onboarding_employment_heading: Eipone ali ejaatar jo keda aswam?
onboarding_purpose_heading: Inyoin bo ikoto jo aijaun eloni?
onboarding_purpose_sub: Oseu atutubet na itetemi ejok eipudikon.
pay_card_required: Ibusakinit adumun akiro nuikamunitos akaadi kanu aitac keda akaadi.
pay_exceeds_balance: Ikapun lu edeparitos ikapun lu ejai.
pay_exceeds_balance_msg: Mam etacio loepol adepar etacio loideuna.
pay_phone_required: Ekotoi enaaba loka esimu kanu aitac ikapun kosimu.
